chat.author: Daniel King
chat.text:
Apologies for the audio issue on the Req I-D. My bad. 
As mentioned at the mic just now. I'll start a thread on the list for potential inter-op for 1 or 2 of the scenarios mentioned in the Applicability document, or even something new. 
Just to reiterate I dont want to delay or gate the App I-D.
If anyone has an open source controller/orchestrator that may be applicable too, please drop into the discussion.
